## Summary

Describe the change and its user or developer impact.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests or checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation links were reviewed when paths or behavior changed.

## Documentation governance

Complete this section when the pull request adds or materially changes Markdown under `docs/`.

- Topic: <!-- product | workspace | fsm | architecture | customization | identity | catalog | operations | releases | documentation-governance | not applicable -->
- Status: <!-- canonical | active | proposed | historical | evidence | not applicable -->
- Canonical authority: <!-- link or not applicable -->
- Supersedes: <!-- link, title, or none -->

- [ ] The document includes the required metadata table.
- [ ] The document is reachable from `docs/README.md` through the topic graph.
- [ ] Authority or lifecycle changes are reflected in `docs/README.md`.
- [ ] Evidence is kept separate from normative specifications.
- [ ] `pnpm docs:check` passes.
